notes: Phase 8.4 — Diagnostics in-memory ring buffer + presentation surface. Added Invocation (Sendable value type, stdout intentionally excluded) and InvocationLog actor (bounded, default 200, newest-first reads). Added InvocationLogging protocol so ProcessShellRunner can take an optional sink without a hard dependency on the concrete actor. Added a new ProcessShellRunner.init(invocationLog:) overload — zero-arg init() preserved so existing call sites are untouched. Each run publishes one sanitised Invocation: args + stderr go through PassErrorMapper.sanitize; sentinel exit codes -1/-2/-3 mark spawn-failure/cancellation/timeout; the record is delivered via Task.detached so the actor's mailbox never blocks the runner. Log.shell emits a shape-only debug line per invocation (executable .private, status/excerptLen .public). Added DiagnosticsModel (@MainActor @Observable) and a minimal DiagnosticsView (List rows: timestamp, basename, args, exitCode, stderr excerpt). View is intentionally NOT mounted in KizbaApp yet — Phase 8 wires it. Tests: InvocationLogTests (5), DiagnosticsModelTests (2), ProcessShellRunnerInvocationTests (3). Full suite 188 passed (was 178; +10). project.pbxproj unchanged (PBXFileSystemSynchronizedRootGroup auto-picks new files). SourceGrepTests still green: no raw print, no stdout references, no direct Logger instantiation in Infrastructure outside Log.swift, PassSecret stays non-Codable. Note: project default isolation is MainActor, so Invocation.init is explicitly nonisolated.
commits: chore(shell): publish invocation records from ProcessShellRunner
test(diagnostics): add InvocationLog and DiagnosticsModel tests
